heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 9871 Authorization of appropriations
text: For the purpose of making allotments to States to carry out the activities described in , there is authorized to be appropriated $13,000,000 for fiscal year 1995.section 9874 of this title
notes: Amendments1994— substituted “is authorized to be appropriated $13,000,000 for fiscal year 1995” for “are authorized to be appropriated $20,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1990 and 1991, and such sums as may be necessary for fiscal years 1992, 1993, and 1994”.Pub. L. 103–2521990— substituted “are authorized” for “is authorized”, struck out “1987, 1988, 1989, and” before “1990”, and inserted “and 1991, and such sums as may be necessary for fiscal years 1992, 1993, and 1994” after “1990”.Pub. L. 101–5011986— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “For the purpose of allotments to States to carry out the activities described in , there are authorized to be appropriated $20,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1985 and 1986.”Pub. L. 99–425section 9874 of this title

Effective Date of 1994 AmendmentAmendment by effective , but not applicable to Head Start agencies and other recipients of financial assistance under the Head Start Act ( et seq.) until , see , set out as a note under .Pub.
